title: lasiochloa hispida
intro: Lasiochloa hispida, also known as Rough Panic, is a species of grass native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating wounds. Lasiochloa hispida can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile medicinal plant.
